name: BrigthLocal
description:
What BrigthLoal Does

Brightlocal is a local SEO platform with a powerful toolset for ranking higher locally. It empowers local businesses and marketing agencies to generate traffic and leads from local searches. Bright local is an industry-leader that serves well-known brands like Hilton and Ikea. 

With Brightlocal, you can build citations, ensure consistency in your business information everywhere, and perform citation and Google Business Profile audits.

BrightLocal is mainly a robust local SEO software platform. But Singleinterface goes beyond that with hyperlocal advertising and inventory management.  
‍

Source: G2

Key Features

BrightLocal’s main features include: 

  • Track local rankings, keyword, and website performance across multiple locations and search engines. 
  • Brightlocal is an industry-leading platform for local listings and search, with features for local SEO audits, reports, and listings management services.
  • Competitor insights: Analyze competitor SEO strategies to identify gaps and opportunities to improve your business's SEO (local search and performance).
  • Build and manage citations and audit your Google business profile. 
  • Customizable white-label reports, emails, and client collaboration tools for agencies.

Benefits of BrigthLocal 

With Brightlocal, businesses can:

  • Improve local SEO and rank higher across multiple service locations. The platform allows you to: some text
    • Track local rankings
    • Improve local search visibility. 
  • Produce customized reports, including white-label reports   
  • Monitor and audit local SEO and analyze competitors' SEO strategies to improve yours.
  • Comprehensive citation management: Audit citations and Google business profile listings to ensure accuracy and consistency for SEO success.

Pricing 

The four plans available for Brightlocal clients: 

  • Track: USD 39/monthsome text
    • Essential SEO tools 
  • Manage: USD 49/monthsome text
    • Listings management 
  • Grow: USD 59/monthsome text
    • Review management    
  • Custom plan & price : some text
    • Managing more than 50 listings 

Pros 

✅Local SEO

✅Competitor analyses and insights

✅White-label and other customized reports.  

Cons

🚫Limited features beyond SEO functionality

🚫Steep learning curve 

🚫Technical glitches and poor integration support.

‍
